Name: INTERACTIVE_SMOKE_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters for interactive smoke.

Fields.Name: Particle Generation Count
Fields.Description: The touchable smoke SFX count to generate.

Fields.Name: Duration
Fields.Description: The duration of the touchable smoke. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Radius
Fields.Description: The radius of the touchable smoke. In metres.

Fields.Name: Interaction Time
Fields.Description: The time for the touchable smoke to interact with other entities (e.g. create more smoke). In seconds.

Fields.Name: Maximum Distance from Impact for Generation
Fields.Description: The maximum distance from the point of impact to generate SFX.

Fields.Name: Smoke Particle ID
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the smoke that appears at the impact point.

Fields.Name: Smoke Particle ID: On Touch
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the smoke that sticks when touching the main smoke SFX.

Fields.Name: Smoke Particle ID: On Touch (Parts)
Fields.Description: The SFX ID to use for the smoke that sticks when touching the main smoke SFX (randomly generated from parts)
